Our Flagship Innovations

SlayCal B2C

Your personal AI nutrition coach and chef. Snap a photo of your meal for instant macros, or scan your fridge for customized recipes.

camera Meal Scanner
target Smart Goals
water_drop Hydration

AI QRMenu B2B

speed 2-Min Setup
monitoring Live Tracking
apartment Multi-Branch
